---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or improvement
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem would this feature solve? Who feels the pain, and when?

## Proposed solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Scope / impact

- Component(s) affected: <!-- backend engine / API / frontend / AI layer / CI -->
- Does it change the data model (new Alembic migration)?
- Does it touch the release gate, cascade, diff, or lifecycle rules?

## Additional context

Mockups, references, or related issues.
